steps.title: Classify the first sentence
steps.content: The underlined sentence says yawn contagion occurs when one individual yawns in response to another's yawn. That sentence names the phenomenon and explains what it means before the rest of the text discusses research on it.

steps.title: Remove unsupported functions
steps.content: B is wrong because the sentence does not present a problem. C is wrong because the text does not challenge the sentence. D is wrong because the sentence states a definition, not a hypothesis that the study tests. The answer is A.
